title: Origins: Deserted Titan
description: An ancient machine that sears the skies, powered by soul flames.
body:
**Requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) and the [Pehkui Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) for Minecraft 1.20.1/1.20.2**

Impact: 3

_An ancient relic. The most prized creation of an advanced civilization from
thousands of years ago, given a soul through a long forgotten rite. Served once as a brave warden for the now wiped out civilization. The titan was marooned, left to rust and decay in the wilderness, until the determined spirit within sparks back to consciousness. It fights to survive while commanding a body weathered by the eons._

# Powers

<details>
<summary>Engineered Behemoth</summary>

Your presence is unmistakable. You are 2.3 blocks tall and have 2 additional hearts. Being so big makes you marginally slower overall.

<details>
<summary>Tooltips</summary>

Your movements trigger metallic footsteps. The first hit after entering a charge deals double damage.

</details>

</details>



<details>
<summary>Rusty Thrusters</summary>

**Prime your crude thrusters by holding your primary ability key to lift-off into a hover. Wait for your boost thrusters to engage to enter a rocket-propelled high velocity flight. Wearing an elytra eases the initial lift-off and allows for faster and more sustained flight.**


<details>
<summary>Tooltips</summary>
You mine as fast in the air as if you were grounded.
Standing directly next to a campfire creates an updraft, which eases lift-off

</details>



</details>

<details>
<summary>Soaring Incendiary</summary>

While in rocket-boosted flight, you can crash into the ground, causing an explosion. The blast damage, range and recoil scales with your temperature stability.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Blazing Atomizer</summary>

Hold your secondary ability key to engage your arm thrusters full throttle, incinerating anything that's caught in its blaze.

</details>



<details>
<summary>Crescendous Hurtle</summary>

Your weight hinders your actions. You accelerate way slower, but you gain knockback immunity while sprinting. If not at top sprint speed, your melee attacks hit for 25% weaker damage.

</details>


 

<details>
<summary>Verdigris</summary>

Your aged form is prone to oxidization when performing certain actions, which slows you down and eventually inflicts weakness and mining fatigue. Remove rust by using your thrusters or by scraping it off with an axe.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Degraded Ventilation</summary>

You can't rely on your cooling systems like you used to. You easily overheat when using your thrusters. Taking damage while at unstable or critical temperature may trigger a lethal explosion, also damaging entities around you.

<details>
<summary>Tooltips</summary>

Taking damage while flying and taking fire damage both cause you to gain some heat. Drinking water bottles lowers your temperature and extinguishes you, but also temporarily disables your thrusters.

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Primal Peril</summary>
  
Brief contact with water cools you, but temporarily disables your thrusters. Prolonged contact will cause you to oxidize faster. Fire damage is multiplied by 1.2x and causes you to overheat with each hit.

</details>
